text: Device: Printer Model X500. Error Code: E001. Problem: Paper jam in tray 2. Solution: Removed paper from tray and cleaned rollers.

metadata.work_detail: Removed paper from tray and cleaned rollers

text: Device: Laptop ThinkPad T14. Error Code: E002. Problem: Battery not charging. Solution: Replaced battery cable and updated BIOS.

metadata.work_detail: Replaced battery cable and updated BIOS

text: Device: Server Dell PowerEdge. Error Code: E003. Problem: Overheating. Solution: Replaced thermal paste and cleaned dust filters.

metadata.work_detail: Replaced thermal paste and cleaned dust filters
